name: @ttsc/station
description: Standalone TypeScript-Go compiler, runtime, plugin host, and LSP host workspace.

scripts.experimental: pnpm --dir experimental/install start -- --pack-current && pnpm --dir experimental/test-unplugin start -- --skip-pack
scripts.format: pnpm run gen:flags && prettier --write "**/*.ts" && pnpm run format:go
scripts.package:latest:publish: pnpm --filter=./packages/* --filter=!ttsc -r publish --tag latest --access public --no-git-checks --provenance && pnpm --filter ttsc publish --tag latest --access public --no-git-checks --provenance
scripts.test: pnpm run check:flags && pnpm run build:current && pnpm run test:go && pnpm run test:typecheck && pnpm run test:features
scripts.test:go: node scripts/test-go-transformer.cjs && node scripts/test-go-utility-plugins.cjs && node scripts/test-go-lint.cjs

author: Jeongho Nam
